testcase.name: Root_Still_Returns_200_After_Other_Calls
testcase.system-out:
@scenario.begin
scenario: Root still returns 200 after other calls given the mock API client is ready ... Status.passed in 0.000212s when I GET "/" ... Status.passed in 0.00631s then the status code should be 200 ... Status.passed in 5.317e-05s @scenario.end ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

testcase.name: Second_Root_Check
testcase.system-out:
@scenario.begin
scenario: Second root check given the mock API client is ready ... Status.passed in 0.0001352s when I GET "/" ... Status.passed in 0.001003s then the status code should be 200 ... Status.passed in 4.292e-05s @scenario.end ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

testcase.name: Items_Endpoint_Returns_200_With_Empty_List_After_Reset
testcase.system-out:
@scenario.begin
scenario: Items endpoint returns 200 with empty list after reset given the mock API client is ready ... Status.passed in 9.918e-05s when I GET "/items" ... Status.passed in 0.0008459s then the status code should be 200 ... Status.passed in 4.101e-05s @scenario.end ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

testcase.name: Create_Two_Items_And_List_Them
testcase.system-out:
@scenario.begin
scenario: Create two items and list them given the mock API client is ready ... Status.passed in 9.274e-05s when I POST to "/items" with JSON ... Status.passed in 0.001056s then the status code should be 200 ... Status.passed in 3.719e-05s when I POST to "/items" with JSON ... Status.passed in 0.0007551s then the status code should be 200 ... Status.passed in 3.695e-05s when I GET "/items" ... Status.passed in 0.000649s then the status code should be 200 ... Status.passed in 4.005e-05s @scenario.end ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

testcase.name: Get_First_Item_By_Id
testcase.system-out:
@scenario.begin
scenario: Get first item by id given the mock API client is ready ... Status.passed in 9.298e-05s when I POST to "/items" with JSON ... Status.passed in 0.0007811s then the status code should be 200 ... Status.passed in 3.409e-05s when I GET "/items/1" ... Status.passed in 0.001s then the status code should be 200 ... Status.passed in 4.911e-05s @scenario.end ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

testcase.name: Get_Second_Item_By_Id
testcase.system-out:
@scenario.begin
scenario: Get second item by id given the mock API client is ready ... Status.passed in 0.0001311s when I POST to "/items" with JSON ... Status.passed in 0.000968s then the status code should be 200 ... Status.passed in 3.982e-05s when I POST to "/items" with JSON ... Status.passed in 0.0006809s then the status code should be 200 ... Status.passed in 3.505e-05s when I GET "/items/2" ... Status.passed in 0.0006571s then the status code should be 200 ... Status.passed in 3.29e-05s @scenario.end ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

testcase.name: Login_As_Charlie
testcase.system-out:
@scenario.begin
scenario: Login as charlie given the mock API client is ready ... Status.passed in 8.988e-05s when I POST to "/login" with JSON ... Status.passed in 0.001254s then the status code should be 200 ... Status.passed in 4.101e-05s @scenario.end ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

testcase.system-out:

testcase.name: Secure_With_Invalid_Bearer_Returns_401
testcase.system-out:
@scenario.begin
scenario: Secure with invalid bearer returns 401 given the mock API client is ready ... Status.passed in 8.488e-05s when I request GET "/secure" with Authorization "Bearer invalid-token" ... Status.passed in 0.0008581s then the status code should be 401 ... Status.passed in 3.314e-05s @scenario.end ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

testcase.name: Admin_With_Malformed_Bearer_Returns_401
testcase.system-out:
@scenario.begin
scenario: Admin with malformed bearer returns 401 given the mock API client is ready ... Status.passed in 8.798e-05s when I request GET "/admin" with Authorization "not-bearer xyz" ... Status.passed in 0.0007811s then the status code should be 401 ... Status.passed in 3.29e-05s @scenario.end ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

scenario: Another chaos sample given the mock API client is ready ... Status.passed in 0.0001259s when I GET "/chaos" ... Status.passed in 0.0009789s then the status code should be one of 200, 401, 500 ... Status.passed in 3.815e-05s @scenario.end ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

testcase.name: Delete_Missing_Item_Returns_404
testcase.system-out:
@scenario.begin
scenario: Delete missing item returns 404 given the mock API client is ready ... Status.passed in 9.203e-05s when I DELETE "/items/999" ... Status.passed in 0.0008292s then the status code should be 404 ... Status.passed in 3.409e-05s @scenario.end ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

testcase.system-out:
@scenario.begin
scenario: Get missing item returns 404 given the mock API client is ready ... Status.passed in 8.583e-05s when I GET "/items/999" ... Status.passed in 0.000685s then the status code should be 404 ... Status.passed in 3.195e-05s @scenario.end ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

testcase.name: Login_Default_Username_Path
testcase.system-out:
@scenario.begin
scenario: Login default username path given the mock API client is ready ... Status.passed in 8.178e-05s when I POST to "/login" with JSON ... Status.passed in 0.0009847s then the status code should be 200 ... Status.passed in 3.195e-05s then the JSON field "token" should exist ... Status.passed in 3.505e-05s @scenario.end ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
